news.title: US launches 'forced labour' trade probe against 60 nations, including India
news.india_relevance: This probe directly targets Indian exports, potentially creating new non-tariff barriers in the US market.
news.why_it_matters: A 'forced labor' designation can trigger import bans, forcing Indian manufacturers to overhaul supply chain auditing to maintain US market access.

news.title: Gulf war shadow: India's $11 billion mobile phone export success story now faces a $3 billion challenge
news.india_relevance: The PLI-led electronics export boom is physically threatened by the disruption of West Asian trade routes.
news.why_it_matters: Logistics bottlenecks in the Gulf could derail India's momentum as a global electronics hub, impacting trade balances and manufacturing targets.

news.title: RBI’s 2026 dividend policy gives banks more headroom; large lenders to benefit
news.india_relevance: This regulatory shift directly affects the capital adequacy and payout capabilities of India's largest commercial banks.
news.why_it_matters: By easing dividend constraints, the RBI allows banks to manage capital more flexibly, potentially attracting more long-term institutional investment.

news.title: India’s Real Energy Crisis Isn’t In The Gulf. It’s The Lack Of Political Will At Home
news.india_relevance: The piece analyzes the structural domestic failures in India's energy policy beyond immediate geopolitical shocks.
news.why_it_matters: It argues that India's vulnerability to oil shocks is a choice driven by stalled domestic reforms rather than just external factors.

news.title: A war in the Gulf, a crisis in Gujarat’s Morbi: India’s ceramics capital counts the cost
news.india_relevance: Morbi is a global ceramics hub; its reliance on imported gas makes it a canary in the coal mine for Indian MSMEs.
news.why_it_matters: Shows the direct transmission of global energy prices to local industrial clusters, threatening thousands of jobs and export contracts.

news.title: Tighter funding rules for banks from April may end broker practice of prop book trades for clients
news.india_relevance: This changes the structural relationship between Indian banks, brokers, and high-net-worth market participants.
news.why_it_matters: The move aims to reduce systemic risk but will likely squeeze liquidity in certain market segments by ending leveraged 'prop' trading practices.

news.title: If UPI dominates, why is cash still growing?
news.india_relevance: Explores the paradox of India's digital payments success alongside persistent high Currency in Circulation (CiC).
news.why_it_matters: Understanding this helps investors and policy nerds grasp the limits of formalization and the true nature of the rural/informal economy.

news.title: India boosts LPG imports from US, Norway as Gulf supplies tighten
news.india_relevance: India is forced to re-engineer its energy supply chain in real-time to avoid a domestic cooking gas crisis.
news.why_it_matters: A permanent shift toward non-Gulf energy sources would change India's long-term trade diplomacy and logistics costs.

news.title: BIG change on LPG booking rule: 45 days gap must for rural households; 25 for urban -- Here's what govt said
news.india_relevance: A major policy intervention affecting the daily lives and consumption patterns of millions of Indian households.
news.why_it_matters: This is a form of demand rationing that signals the severity of the supply crunch and could impact rural inflation and sentiment.

news.title: How Forest Essentials chose ‘anti-growth’ to thrive in beauty
news.india_relevance: A deep dive into the business model of a premier Indian luxury brand navigating the competitive D2C landscape.
news.why_it_matters: Provides a counter-narrative to the 'growth-at-all-costs' model, offering lessons for Indian founders on margins and brand longevity.

news.title: India is running out of gas. Why is Adani Total Gas running up?
news.india_relevance: Analyzes the disconnect between physical gas shortages and the market valuation of a major Indian utility player.
news.why_it_matters: Explains how infrastructure ownership and long-term contracts can insulate certain firms from immediate commodity shocks.

news.title: Manufacturing share in listed firms' FY25 GVA fell below pre-Covid levels
news.india_relevance: A critical look at the 'Make in India' progress using Gross Value Added (GVA) data from listed entities.
news.why_it_matters: Indicates that despite policy pushes, the structural shift toward manufacturing is lagging, which has long-term implications for job creation.

news.title: War-struck rupee: If the oil shock persists, India will need to widen its crisis response toolkit
news.india_relevance: Analysis of the RBI's options as the Rupee hits record lows against the Dollar.
news.why_it_matters: Suggests that traditional interest rate hikes may not suffice, hinting at more aggressive forex interventions or capital controls.

news.title: US-Israel-Iran War: After India, US offers other nations 30-day waiver to buy Russian oil; details
news.india_relevance: Directly impacts India's ability to source discounted oil and its relative advantage in energy pricing.
news.why_it_matters: If other nations get the same waivers India enjoyed, the competitive advantage for Indian refiners might diminish while global supply stabilizes.

news.title: India’s West Asia trade artery under strain with up to $4 billion in monthly exports at risk
news.india_relevance: Quantifies the immediate financial risk to Indian exporters due to the Strait of Hormuz standoff.
news.why_it_matters: The $4 billion figure represents a significant portion of India's monthly trade, threatening the current account deficit.

news.title: AI Vs IT Jobs: CLSA says, ‘new hiring targets intact, no negative impact’ – IT hiring up 6.4% - The Financial Express
news.india_relevance: Addresses the primary anxiety of the Indian middle class: the survival of the IT services job engine.
news.why_it_matters: Contradicts the 'AI doom' narrative for Indian tech, suggesting that GenAI is currently creating more work than it is automating away.

news.title: New LCR norms could help banks expand credit by 7%
news.india_relevance: A technical change in Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) rules that directly impacts lending capacity in India.
news.why_it_matters: This is a significant lever for credit growth, potentially offsetting the impact of high interest rates on the broader economy.

news.title: India reconsiders 1 GW offshore wind tender after earlier auctions fail to attract bidders, official tells DTE
news.india_relevance: Highlights the friction in India's green energy transition and the difficulty of attracting private capital to complex projects.
news.why_it_matters: Failure to attract bidders suggests that current tariff structures or risk-sharing models in Indian renewables need a major overhaul.

news.title: LPG supply fears spark induction stove rush in India
news.india_relevance: A fascinating shift in Indian consumer behavior and the electrical appliance market driven by energy insecurity.
news.why_it_matters: This 'forced' electrification of kitchens could lead to a permanent shift in energy demand from gas to the power grid.

news.title: Software companies fight back against fears that AI will kill them
news.india_relevance: Focuses on how Indian SaaS and IT firms are pivoting their business models to integrate GenAI.
news.why_it_matters: The survival of the Indian software sector depends on moving from 'labor arbitrage' to 'AI-augmented value' models.

news.title: India plans to tighten security checks for telecom equipment
news.india_relevance: A policy move with major implications for telecom operators like Jio, Airtel, and their global vendors.
news.why_it_matters: Increased scrutiny on 'trusted sources' could raise costs for 5G rollout and further exclude Chinese vendors from the Indian ecosystem.

news.title: Supreme Court to deploy AI system for case listing, bench allocation
news.india_relevance: A structural change in the administration of the Indian judiciary to reduce bias and delays.
news.why_it_matters: If successful, this could significantly improve the 'Ease of Doing Business' by making the legal process more predictable and transparent.

news.title: India asks China for urea as war-induced gas crunch bites
news.india_relevance: A rare and significant trade request that highlights India's food security vulnerability due to gas shortages.
news.why_it_matters: Urea is critical for the rabi crop; relying on China for it during a border standoff shows the desperation of the energy crisis.

news.title: Killing of Modi’s Invited Iranian Guests Strains US-India Ties - Bloomberg.com
news.india_relevance: A high-stakes diplomatic incident that complicates India's 'multi-alignment' foreign policy.
news.why_it_matters: Geopolitical friction with the US can have second-order effects on trade deals, technology transfers, and capital flows into India.

news.title: LPG delays, black marketing hit 57% households in the past week: Survey

rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights the practical challenges in India's green energy transition. Policy ambitions are hitting execution roadblocks, delaying energy security goals.

rankings.title: If UPI dominates, why is cash still growing?
rankings.india_relevance: Analyses a persistent paradox in India's much-celebrated digital finance story.
rankings.why_it_matters: Goes beyond surface-level digital payment metrics to ask deeper questions about financial behaviour, informal economy, and true financial inclusion.

rankings.title: India’s NBFC sector set for AI-driven transformation amid rising competition
rankings.india_relevance: Forecasts a structural change in a key segment of India's financial system.
rankings.why_it_matters: AI adoption could redefine credit assessment, risk management, and customer service in NBFCs, impacting their profitability and reach in a crowded market.

rankings.title: Software companies fight back against fears that AI will kill them
rankings.india_relevance: Addresses an existential question for India's flagship IT services industry.
rankings.why_it_matters: The industry's response to AI disruption will determine the future of millions of jobs, its pricing power, and its role in the global economy.

rankings.title: India’s Real Energy Crisis Isn’t In The Gulf. It’s The Lack Of Political Will At Home
rankings.india_relevance: Offers an opinionated critique of India's domestic energy policy failures.
rankings.why_it_matters: Argues that the external shock exposes deeper, self-inflicted vulnerabilities in gas infrastructure, pricing, and diversification, shifting the blame and the required solution set.

rankings.title: Manufacturing share in listed firms' FY25 GVA fell below pre-Covid levels
rankings.india_relevance: Provides data on a concerning trend for India's stated economic ambitions.
rankings.why_it_matters: Despite 'Make in India', the listed corporate sector is becoming less manufacturing-intensive. This raises questions about the quality of economic growth and job creation.

rankings.title: Tighter funding rules for banks from April may end broker practice of prop book trades for clients
rankings.india_relevance: Uncovers a potential, under-the-radar regulatory change affecting Indian capital markets.
rankings.why_it_matters: Could alter liquidity and trading dynamics in equity markets by restricting a common funding route for brokers, impacting market structure.

rankings.title: India, US exploring opportunities in advanced engines, unmanned systems and expanded MRO, says Sergio Gor
rankings.india_relevance: Reveals ongoing strategic defence and tech cooperation talks with a key partner.
rankings.why_it_matters: Points to future high-tech collaboration that could boost India's defence manufacturing under 'Atmanirbhar Bharat' and deepen US-India strategic ties.

rankings.title: Digital Green, Andhra Pradesh’s SERP partner to digitise women-led FPOs and SHGs
rankings.india_relevance: Covers a grassroots initiative to digitise and empower rural women's economic collectives.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights a bottom-up model for improving rural livelihoods and market access through tech, relevant to discussions on inclusive growth and agricultural efficiency.

rankings.title: Project Chittoor targets ₹1 lakh an acre annual income for farmers
rankings.india_relevance: Details a specific agricultural pilot project with a clear income target.
rankings.why_it_matters: A tangible case study in attempted farm income doubling, involving crop diversification and market linkages. Its success or failure is a data point for agrarian policy.
